ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiment */,
  "onset" REAL /* Onset time of the stimulus in seconds */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus display in seconds */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., train_face, fixation) */,
  "stim_file" TEXT /* File path to the stimulus image or video */,
  "oneback" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trial is a one-back (1) or not (0) */,
  "trial_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_stim_file FOREIGN KEY ("stim_file") REFERENCES stimuli ("stim_file")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with the response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the response */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond in seconds */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Indicates if the response was correct (true/false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stim_file" TEXT /* File path to the stimulus image or video */,
  "stim_description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the stimulus (e.g., face, object) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, assistant, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimulus_versions" (
  "stim_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus version */,
  "stim_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stimulus */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the stimulus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stim_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimulus_versions_stim_id FOREIGN KEY ("stim_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stim_id")
)
